mxCell.value: NUC
NFHB
adapter

VBS : blind element power, 4.5 V (4.0..4.5 V)
VBB : blind element bias, 1..4 V
VPB : pixel bias, 3.2 V or less (can be set to 2.x V according to temperature drift)
VPS : pixel land, 0 V
VREF: CTIA reference, 2.3 V (for reference)

VOUT : video output (0.2..2.8 V)
VBS : blind element power, 4.5 V (4.0..4.5 V)
VBB : blind element bias, 1..4 V
VPB : pixel bias, 3.2 V or less (can be set to 2.x V according to temperature drift)
VPS : pixel land, 0 V
VREF: CTIA reference, 2.3 V (for reference)
BPM
